texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for choosing The Billionaire Resort & Lion in the Sun - a Billionaire Retreat to be your accommodation partner. One of the most exclusive resort and retreat on the coast of Kenya.
texts.text: Thank you for choosing The Billionaire Resort & Lion in the Sun - a Billionaire Retreat to be your accommodation partner. One of the most exclusive resort and retreat on the coast of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Billionaire Resort offers Ultra-lush modern seafront apartments with spacious private terraces complete with the finest finishing and amenities, which translates the quest of privacy and relax into a pure deluxe experience.
texts.text: Billionaire Resort offers Ultra-lush modern seafront apartments with spacious private terraces complete with the finest finishing and amenities, which translates the quest of privacy and relax into a pure deluxe experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Billionaire Retreat- (Lion in the Sun) Stunning local architecture and spacious interiors of the retreat's 16 tastefully designed rooms and suites. An award-winning spa, five salt-water swimming pools and an array of exciting activities all form part of the Billionaire Retreat.
texts.text: Billionaire Retreat- (Lion in the Sun) Stunning local architecture and spacious interiors of the retreat's 16 tastefully designed rooms and suites. An award-winning spa, five salt-water swimming pools and an array of exciting activities all form part of the Billionaire Retreat.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Half Board KES 4500 per person per night, 50% for child
texts.text: Half Board KES 4500 per person per night, 50% for child

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Full Board KES 7000 per person per night, 50% for child All Inclusive KES 9500 per person per night, 50% for child Single Use 20% discount -Applicable at the Lion in the sun Only Kids under 0-3 years - Free 3-12 years old 50 % of adult rate sharing. >12 years old 100% Extra Adult 100 % of the rate per person sharing
texts.text: Full Board KES 7000 per person per night, 50% for child All Inclusive KES 9500 per person per night, 50% for child Single Use 20% discount -Applicable at the Lion in the sun Only Kids under 0-3 years - Free 3-12 years old 50 % of adult rate sharing. >12 years old 100% Extra Adult 100 % of the rate per person sharing

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Scheduled Airport shuttle from Malindi Airport inclusive
texts.text: Scheduled Airport shuttle from Malindi Airport inclusive

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Private Airport transfers from Malindi Airport at KES 3500 per car, maximum of 4 pax.
texts.text: Private Airport transfers from Malindi Airport at KES 3500 per car, maximum of 4 pax.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Airport Transfers from Mombasa Airport at KES 30000 per car, Maximum of 4 pax.
texts.text: Airport Transfers from Mombasa Airport at KES 30000 per car, Maximum of 4 pax.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● 18% statutory taxes (16% VAT, 2% Catering Levy). Taxes are subject to change without notice.
texts.text: 18% statutory taxes (16% VAT, 2% Catering Levy). Taxes are subject to change without notice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Billionaire Resort and Retreat, guests can move in between the two venues for their best experience and a welcoming and intimate Retreat, and the gorgeous vibe of the Resort
texts.text: At Billionaire Resort and Retreat, guests can move in between the two venues for their best experience and a welcoming and intimate Retreat, and the gorgeous vibe of the Resort

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: HOTEL BANK DETAILS - Kenya Shillings Account
texts.text: HOTEL BANK DETAILS - Kenya Shillings Account

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kindly pay all Bank Charges when making payments to avoid additional Bank charges after completing the payment.
texts.text: Kindly pay all Bank Charges when making payments to avoid additional Bank charges after completing the payment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 29- 14 days prior to the arrival date, 50 % charge applies on the entire booking value
texts.text: 29- 14 days prior to the arrival date, 50 % charge applies on the entire booking value

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 13- 8 days or less prior to the arrival date 60% charge applies on the entire booking value
texts.text: 13- 8 days or less prior to the arrival date 60% charge applies on the entire booking value

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 7- 3 days or less prior to the arrival date 70%
texts.text: 7- 3 days or less prior to the arrival date 70%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 2 days or less prior to the arrival date 80% and for no shows 80 % charge applies on the entire booking value
texts.text: 2 days or less prior to the arrival date 80% and for no shows 80 % charge applies on the entire booking value

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · During festive season 25th Dec - 6th Jan 29 days prior to the arrival date, 80% and for no shows 80 % charge applies on the entire booking value
texts.text: During festive season 25th Dec - 6th Jan 29 days prior to the arrival date, 80% and for no shows 80 % charge applies on the entire booking value

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30-days' notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfil the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable
texts.text: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30-days' notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfil the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO).
texts.text: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.
texts.text: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the Billionaire Resort & Retreat Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.
texts.text: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the Billionaire Resort & Retreat Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Confirmation of accommodation by the Billionaire Resort or Retreat will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation. The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format.
texts.text: Confirmation of accommodation by the Billionaire Resort or Retreat will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation. The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the Resort or Retreat as soon as possible.
texts.text: If the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the Resort or Retreat as soon as possible.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Billionaire Resort or Retreat will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival.
texts.text: The Billionaire Resort or Retreat will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations can be made directly to Billionaire Resort & Retreat: Marine Park Road,  P.O. Box 1056,  80200 Malindi, KENYA +254 20 2180375
texts.text: Reservations can be made directly to Billionaire Resort & Retreat: Marine Park Road,  P.O. Box 1056,  80200 Malindi, KENYA +254 20 2180375

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.
texts.text: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rate includes breakfast in the main restaurants. Meals are a la carte served at the Billionaire Resort or Retreat Room service will incur a charge.
texts.text: Rate includes breakfast in the main restaurants. Meals are a la carte served at the Billionaire Resort or Retreat Room service will incur a charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-in from 15:00Hrs Check out time on the day of departure is 11:00Hrs
texts.text: Check-in from 15:00Hrs Check out time on the day of departure is 11:00Hrs

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Early arrivals/Late check out require pre-booking/confirmation to guarantee rooms on arrival and this is subject to availability.
texts.text: Early arrivals/Late check out require pre-booking/confirmation to guarantee rooms on arrival and this is subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Day Room rate is at seventy-five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate.
texts.text: The Day Room rate is at seventy-five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check out time for day use is 17:00hrs. Check-out after 17:00hrs is subject to the full room rate. Day Rooms subject to availability.
texts.text: Check out time for day use is 17:00hrs. Check-out after 17:00hrs is subject to the full room rate. Day Rooms subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel will consider allotments on special request by the Operator. Updates on allotment status would be required advising the number of rooms sold at 90 days, 60 days and 30 days.
texts.text: The hotel will consider allotments on special request by the Operator. Updates on allotment status would be required advising the number of rooms sold at 90 days, 60 days and 30 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.
texts.text: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount. Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.
texts.text: Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount. Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator agrees to pay all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques. Payment will be as per the issued voucher.
texts.text: The Operator agrees to pay all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques. Payment will be as per the issued voucher.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: balance on 14 days prior to arrival at the hotel.
texts.text: balance on 14 days prior to arrival at the hotel.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For companies without approved credit facilities, the following deposit policy applies:
texts.text: For companies without approved credit facilities, the following deposit policy applies:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.
texts.text: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out.
texts.text: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Operators should advise their guests on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel.
texts.text: Operators should advise their guests on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator
texts.text: For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A maximum of two persons are permitted per room.
texts.text: A maximum of two persons are permitted per room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Triple rooms are available upon request subject to availability. Extra bed available for children 3 - 12 years.
texts.text: Triple rooms are available upon request subject to availability. Extra bed available for children 3 - 12 years.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12-years sharing a room with an Adult/s will be charged USD 100 per child. 12-years sharing own room pay 75% of the double adult rate.
texts.text: Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12-years sharing a room with an Adult/s will be charged USD 100 per child. 12-years sharing own room pay 75% of the double adult rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate.
texts.text: Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Except for the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.
texts.text: Except for the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis
texts.text: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.
texts.text: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Billionaire Resort & Retreat, Malindi's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Billionaire Resort & Retreat, Malindi's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to both parties herein. The operator shall not under any circumstances divulge or permit to be divulged this agreement or its comments to any other person or entity.
texts.text: The Operator confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to both parties herein. The operator shall not under any circumstances divulge or permit to be divulged this agreement or its comments to any other person or entity.

texts.text: All parties shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence.

texts.text: Any amendments to this agreement should be made in writing and signed by both the company and the hotel.

texts.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya

texts.text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto and shall supersede any other representation, agreement, statement and understanding made prior to the execution thereof other than those expressly set forth with.
